headline: ONEOK (OKE) Joins Defensive Indexes As The Market Weighs Its Value Case
summary: ONEOK (OKE) stock is in focus after index changes shifted how it is grouped by style investors, with the company added to the Russell 1000 Defensive and Value Defensive indexes and removed from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index. See our latest analysis for ONEOK. At a latest share price of $89.50, ONEOK has given investors a 20.39% year to date share price return and a 5 year total shareholder return of 116.53%, with index reclassifications and upcoming earnings keeping sentiment in focus.
